content:
We communicate sporadically on FB ( I haven't had a phone for many years)
My closest family connection is my next younger brother (you might find him in Wikipedia) who is currently Deputy Director of JAG for NORAD out of Colorado Springs, having retired as full Colonel as a JAG lawyer after 30 years in the US Air Force. I give this info as further evidence of how we were generally brought up. My oldest brother also became a lawyer and my youngest brother I a cop in Chicago. So you can see somewhat from what sort of social and educational environment I come
